items.title: Feature Selection (dimensionality reduction)
items.description: The dimensionality-reduction topic covers filter/wrapper/embedded mechanics, mutual information, L1 sparsity, RFE loops, and PCA contrast; this topic applies those methods inside leakage-safe engineering pipelines.

items.title: Data Leakage
items.description: Selecting features using test labels or full-dataset statistics before splitting leaks target information and invalidates reported metrics— the central failure mode this topic prevents.

items.title: Cross-Validation
items.description: RFECV and Pipeline + cross_val_score evaluate feature subsets on held-out folds so subset size and selector parameters are chosen without peeking at the final test set.

items.title: Random Forests
items.description: Tree impurity importances power embedded selection via SelectFromModel and exploratory ranking; forests are a common base estimator for RFE on non-linear tabular data.

items.title: Principal Component Analysis
items.description: PCA creates new orthogonal components; feature selection keeps original column names for auditability—choose extraction when correlation groups dominate, selection when named inputs matter.
